mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, title, description, type, reward, pickup_location, delivery_location, status, acceptor_id, create_time, update_time, deadline FROM task WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT id, user_id, title, description, type, reward, pickup_location, delivery_location, status, acceptor_id, create_time, update_time, deadline FROM task WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT id, user_id, title, description, type, reward, pickup_location, delivery_location, status, acceptor_id, create_time, update_time, deadline FROM task WHERE acceptor_id = #{acceptorId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
